headline: 2 Reasons to Like YUM and 1 to Stay Skeptical
summary: Yum! Brands’s 10.6% return over the past six months has outpaced the S&P 500 by 9.5%, and its stock price has climbed to $161.09 per share. This was partly thanks to its solid quarterly results, and the performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: ‘Not all proteins are created equal’: Inside PepsiCo’s approach to functional ingredients
summary: The snacks giant is ensuring that cleaner ingredients don’t compromise taste or color, especially as consumers send mixed messages around what they want.

headline: Hershey combines salty, sweets units to accelerate growth
summary: The Reese’s maker also announced several leadership changes, including expanding the oversight of sweets head Andrew Archambault to include the full U.S. portfolio.

raw.headline: Hershey combines salty, sweets units to accelerate growth

headline: PepsiCo Leans On Sunset Amphitheaters To Extend Live Event Reach
summary: PepsiCo (NasdaqGS:PEP) has been named the exclusive beverage supplier for Venu Holding Corporation’s expanding Sunset Amphitheater network across multiple U.S. cities. The agreement focuses on out of home and experiential beverage sales in live entertainment venues. This partnership follows PepsiCo’s recent loss of the NBA soft drink sponsorship and represents a new avenue for live event exposure. For PepsiCo, best known for its global beverage and snacks portfolio, this new partnership...

headline: Best Dividend Kings: March 2026
